basic_details.job_title: NILERD Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 13 Joint Director, Deputy and Assistant Director Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Labour Economics Research and Development (NILERD)
basic_details.post_name: Joint Director, Deputy Director, Assistant Director
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: within 45 days from the date of publication in Employment News

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years (not exceeding 50 years for contract, not exceeding 56 years for deputation)
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation is not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in Economics, Development Studies, Statistics, Engineering/Technology, Business Management, Public Policy or Social Sciences, Post-Master’s experience in research/teaching at supervisory level, High-quality publications in peer-reviewed journals/edited books, Desirable: Ph.D., consultancy/project experience, econometric software skills
qualification.details: Joint Director: Master’s in Economics/Development Studies/Statistics/Engg./Tech/Business Mgmt/Public Policy/Social Sciences + 8 years post-Master’s supervisory research/teaching experience + 5 high-quality publications. Desirable: Ph.D., consultancy experience. Deputy Director: Master’s in relevant fields + 5 years post-Master’s supervisory research/teaching experience + 3 high-quality publications. Desirable: Ph.D., consultancy experience. Assistant Director: Master’s in relevant fields + 3 years post-Master’s research/teaching experience. Desirable: Ph.D., consultancy experience.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NILERD Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: within 45 days from the date of publication in Employment News
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NILERD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NILERD recruitment is 28th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by NILERD?
faq.answer: NILERD has announced a total of 13 vacancies for the posts of Joint Director, Deputy Director, and Assistant Director. This offers a good number of opportunities for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master’s degree in relevant fields such as Economics, Development Studies, Statistics, Engineering/Technology, Business Management, Public Policy, or Social Sciences. Specific experience and publication requirements vary by post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the NILERD positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 1,25,000/- to Rs. 1,45,000/-. This is a competitive salary package for the roles offered.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for NILERD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates, including General/OBC and SC/ST. This makes the application process more accessible to all eligible individuals.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to these posts is 35 years. However, there are provisions for age relaxation for contract and deputation roles, up to 50 and 56 years respectively.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the NILERD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to prepare their application with all required documents and send it to the official email address before the closing date.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the application?
faq.answer: You will need to attach self-attested copies of your educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs along with your application.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Contractual. This means the positions are offered on a contract basis for a specified period.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for NILERD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
